## Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Code coverage is maintained or improved

### Security
- [ ] This change does not introduce any security vulnerabilities
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials, API keys, or secrets
- [ ] Proper input validation is implemented
- [ ] Safe command execution practices are followed
- [ ] SQL injection prevention measures are in place
- [ ] XSS prevention measures are in place

### Documentation
- [ ] README.md updated if needed
- [ ] API documentation updated
- [ ] Architecture diagrams updated if applicable
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated with changes
- [ ] Migration guide provided if breaking changes

### Dependencies
- [ ] New dependencies are necessary and justified
- [ ] New dependencies are compatible with the project license
- [ ] `requirements.txt` updated if needed
- [ ] `pyproject.toml` updated if needed
- [ ] `package.json` updated if frontend changes
